name: Ecommerce beginner seeking first campaign
prompt: I just launched a dropshipping store selling a $79 posture corrector. I've never run ads before and have $2,000 to spend on testing. What platform should I use and how do I structure my first campaign?

name: Coach struggling to scale past $200/day
prompt: I sell a $5,000 coaching program. My Meta ads have been profitable at $200/day with 4x ROAS for 3 weeks. Every time I increase to $500/day, my CPA doubles. How do I scale without killing profitability?
expected_topics: Bell curve explanation (warm to cold audience transition)
ROAS dropping at scale is normal

name: SaaS founder choosing ad platform
prompt: We have a B2B SaaS tool for project management ($29/mo). We're at $10K MRR and want to use paid ads to grow. Should we use Google or Facebook? Budget is $3,000/month.

name: Diagnosing low conversion rate
prompt: My Facebook ads have great CTR (2.3%) but my landing page only converts at 1.5%. I'm spending $100/day and getting leads at $45 each which is too expensive for my $1,500 program. What's wrong?
expected_topics: High CTR + low CR diagnosis (message mismatch or wrong traffic)

name: Course creator building ad funnel
prompt: I'm launching a $497 online course on photography. I have testimonials from beta students. I want to use Meta ads. What funnel should I build and how should I structure the campaign?
expected_topics: Lead gen with instant forms vs landing page
